scripts.build: cargo build -p flexweave && bun run --cwd docs build
scripts.check: ultracite check && cargo fmt -p flexweave -- --check && cargo clippy -p flexweave --all-targets -- -D warnings && bun run --cwd docs check
scripts.verify: bun run check && bun run test && RUSTDOCFLAGS='-D warnings' cargo doc -p flexweave --no-deps && bun run --cwd docs build
